text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the autumn Tenno Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of their strong wills, Vodka and Daiwa
Scarlet have been able to walk their own paths
without being influenced by the other's way of
life.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unwilling to give in, they put everything on the
line and face off in this autumn's big race!
